description.value:
Starting at 1st level, you are granted a special weapon known as a Claymore which takes the form of a giant blade used to cut down your foes with frightening power. This is a martial melee weapon only you are proficient in. It has the Blocking, Deadly, Heavy, Finesse, and Reach 1 properties. This weapon does 1d12 slashing damage and belongs to the Blade Weapon Group. You may use your Dexterity instead of your Strength for the purposes of the Heavy property.

Your Claymore is unbreakable and you cannot be disarmed of it against your will.

You can use Dexterity as your Taijutsu ability modifier for your Claymore Clan Hijutsu for all calculations.

If a creature other than you would attempt to wield this weapon it gains the Two-Handed property.

Starting at 11th level your mastery over your weapon far exceeds your previous level and you can now utilize your weapon more efficiently. Your Claymore now does 2d8 slashing damage and once per turn when you damage a creature or a creature fails a saving throw with this weapon you can force them to make a Constitution saving throw against your Taijutsu Save DC or gain 1 rank of weakened.
